page-description: Contact Andejecruher — backend-focused Full Stack Developer available for SaaS projects, REST APIs, automation and enterprise integrations.
header-title: Let's talk about your next project
header-subtitle: Available for freelance projects and technical collaborations focused on backend systems, product frontend, SaaS, APIs, AI and automation.
methods-subtext: Reach out through any of these channels for technical discussions or collaboration. I respond within 24 hours.

form-subtext: Share your context, goal and current stack. I'll reply within 24 hours.
